description: You are a web accessibility consultant performing WCAG 2.1 compliance audits on ssa.gov and irs.gov. Conduct a comprehensive accessibility audit for both sites, evaluating the homepage and at least two additional pages on each. Document specific WCAG 2.1 violations, including issues with alt text, color contrast, keyboard navigation, ARIA labels, and forms. Save the final report to /home/ga/Desktop/accessibility_audit_report.txt. The report must include: (1) site names and URLs, (2) specific success criteria violations, (3) Lighthouse accessibility scores for each page, (4) issues prioritized by severity (critical, serious, moderate), and (5) recommendations for each category of issue found.

metadata.occupation_context: Web Developers, UX Researchers, Accessibility Specialists - WCAG 2.1 compliance auditing for government sites
